## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` is green locally (typecheck + lint + tests). CI runs the same gate and must pass.
- [ ] New behavior has tests (this repo is TDD — see `CLAUDE.md`).
- [ ] Front-end changes follow the design system (`docs/frontend-guidelines.md`): no `className` outside `src/ui`.
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat` / `fix` / `chore` / `docs` / `refactor`).
